title: pilogyne subcoriacea
intro: Pilogyne subcoriacea, also known as the Red Stinkwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pilogyne subcoriacea include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
